mapper.select: SELECT id, parent_id, name, type, path, component, permission, icon, sort_order, visible, create_time, update_time FROM sys_menu ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
SELECT id, parent_id, name, type, path, component, permission, icon, sort_order, visible, create_time, update_time FROM sys_menu WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_menu SET parent_id = #{parentId}, name = #{name}, type = #{type}, path = #{path}, component = #{component}, permission = #{permission}, icon = #{icon}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, visible = #{visible} WHERE id = #{id}
